heading: Laws and regulations applicable to added lands; free use of roads maintained by State
label: 110 Laws and regulations applicable to added lands; free use of roads maintained by State
text: All laws applicable to and in force within the Mount Rainier National Park as of , and all regulations issued pursuant thereto, are made applicable to and extended over the land added to the said park by : , That no fee or charge shall be made by the United States for the use of any roads in said park built or maintained exclusively by the State of Washington.January 31, 1931section 109 of this titleProvided
